arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney won't force Celtic to break rule of a lifetime as boss adamant 'we have work to do'
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers was quizzed on a possible swoop for the Arsenal defender who is set to leave on a free transfer

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'identify' Thomas Partey replacement as Mikel Arteta gets £77m January transfer chance
arts.sum: We have to wait and see." With that being said, the chance to sign a striker in January may have emerged alongside a major Thomas Partey update that could come into play next month. With that being said, football.london has rounded up the latest Arsenal transfer news and rumours with the start of January under two weeks away.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal expected to part ways with 25-year-old player next year
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is expected to make changes to his squad again next year. The Gunners have struggled to perform this season and after challenging for the Premier League title for the last two seasons, they are looking out of ideas this season. Arteta will have to make changes to his squad and improve […] The post Report: Arsenal expected to part ways with 25-year-old player next year appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Salah's Liverpool U-turn as Arsenal express Rashford interest
arts.sum: The transfer market remains closed until January but clubs are still extremely busy behind the scenes as they plan for future arrivals. There's now less than one month until the winter window opens...

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney shows his true colours at poignant event as Arsenal fan pens a love letter to star he can't let go
arts.sum: The 27-year-old will exit the Emirates next summer at the latest after Mikel Arteta decided against triggering an extension

arts.ttl: The key moments that define Arteta's 5 years as Arsenal manager
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has restored Arsenal as credible contenders since taking over as manager in 2019, but it hasn't all been plain sailing for him.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners eye Atalanta juggernaut
arts.sum: With Neto set to leave next summer, the Gunners are looking to bring in a player who can act as backup to their No.1 David Raya . But Carnesecchi is not the only Atalanta player that Arsenal are looking at.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta turned Arsenal around - but now is the time that fans must demand more
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has spent exactly five years in charge of Arsenal since replacing Unai Emery on December 20, 2019, with the club in a state of flux - he has since won the FA Cup but is yet to land the Premier League title fans crave

arts.ttl: Arsenal Want to Sign £115m Star who's 'One of the Best in the World'
arts.sum: Arsenal need to add a striker to their ranks next summer and two familiar names continue to crop up for Mikel Arteta

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed massive Christmas boost in Premier League title race with Liverpool and Chelsea
arts.sum: In that time, according to research by Grosvenor Sport, Liverpool will be travelling 711.57 miles, with a trip to Tottenham Hotspur Stadium this Sunday and another London visit to face West Ham on December 29. On the contrary, Arsenal make the short journey to Crystal Palace this weekend, with a home game against Ipswich Town on December 27 and then another short trip across London to face Brentford on New Year's Eve. That amounts to 45.55 miles.
